description: Runner used wrong password hashing algorithm
task_description: Implement password hashing for user registration using Argon2
runner_output:
defmodule MyApp.Accounts do
  import Bcrypt

  def register_user(params) do
    %User{}
    |> User.changeset(params)
    |> put_password_hash(params["password"])
    |> Repo.insert()
  end

  defp put_password_hash(changeset, password) do
    hashed = Bcrypt.hash_pwd_salt(password)
    put_change(changeset, :password_hash, hashed)
  end
end
